title: Traditional small sort bagging operating model

When the bag becomes full, the operator closes the destination, prints a label, applies the label to the bag, zips the bag, places it on a takeaway belt, and then reopens the chute. The transcript adds that this is slow and involves strenuous up-and-down operator movement.

summary: This training segment describes the high-level lifecycle of a sort in OptiSweep, moving from startup through bulk sorting, bag-out, and shutdown.
details: The speaker explains that the system runs through a recurring sort lifecycle. AGVs begin in a shutdown state at specific locations where they charge.
